results.story: The store renamed resultCount but the graph guard still reads the old key.
results.detail: dangling-guard-key: Action “catalog.filter-by-color” is gated on “inventoryReady”, which nothing produces — no action writes it, and you did not list it in the initial or external state. This action can never become available. · uncompletable-skill: Skill “find-dress” can never finish: step “catalog

results.story: A merge mangled the guard into a condition no state can satisfy.
results.detail: unsatisfiable-guard: Action “catalog.view-dress” has a guard on “resultCount” that can never be true (lower bound 5 is above upper bound 3) — the control it maps to can never light up.

results.story: A redesign repointed the "My orders" link home; nothing reaches orders anymore.
results.detail: unreachable-page: Page “orders” is not the start page and no action navigates to it — nothing in the graph can reach it.

results.story: place-order stopped declaring orderCount; the track-order skill can never unlock.
Search grew a telemetry write nothing in the graph consumes (leftover claim).
results.detail: unconsumed-write: Action “catalog.search-dresses” declares it writes “resultIds” and “searchTelemetry”, but no guard anywhere reads them — the write does nothing for planning (the app UI may still use it).

results.story: The purchase flow references a coupon step that was deleted from the app.
